g.text: 3. Store List Reranking — sets class-level mutable state
4. Intermixing Split — splits store list at index 30
Each method resolves its own flags via static calls
Adding an experiment: 2-3 weeks of careful threading
Coarse Pipeline · Same code, explicit state
DVs still resolved inside existing methods (unchanged)
Immutable data class flows through all steps
Data between steps is explicit (state fields, not local vars)
DV-gated: instant rollback by turning off the flag
Zero behavior change — same code called in same order
DVs still scattered · Concerns still bundled within coarse steps
Full Decomposition · Single responsibility per step
Add a step = add a class · Skip = isApplicable() returns false · Test = unit test one class
